title: July high-temperature record in Calderport
question: Did the city of Calderport set a new July high-temperature record, as reported by the National Weather Bureau, on or before the settlement date of July 31, 2026?

evidence.label: National Weather Bureau daily climate report for Calderport, July 2026
Calderport station historical July records table (prior record: 41.2 C, set July 18, 1998)
